# RVASCII — Copilot Instructions

Read AGENTS.md for complete project architecture before making changes.

Stack: Vite + TypeScript (vanilla), Canvas API, gif.js, MediaRecorder.
Pipeline: Image/Video/Camera → ImageData → AsciiGrid → Render/Export.
Export: PNG, JPG, SVG, GIF (gif.js), MP4 (captureStream + audio).
